channel.title: Beautiful India - Latest Tours
channel.description: The latest tour packages to explore India's wonders.

item.title: Kashmir Tour Package
item.description: Experience the paradise on earth with our Kashmir tour package.

item.title: Kerala Tour Package
item.description: A Kerala tour offers beautiful backwaters, hill stations, beaches, and wildlife.

item.title: Golden Triangle Train Tour
item.description: Explore Delhi, Agra, and Jaipur by the luxurious Gatimaan Express and Shatabdi.
